description: Schema for an Apache Pulsar message including metadata and payload.

messageId.description: Unique message ID in format ledgerId:entryId:partitionIndex

payload.description: The message payload, encoded according to the topic schema

key.description: Message key used for topic compaction and Key_Shared subscriptions

orderingKey.description: Ordering key for Key_Shared subscription ordering

properties.description: User-defined key-value properties attached to the message

publishTime.description: Timestamp when the message was published

producerName.description: Name of the producer that published the message

redeliveryCount.description: Number of times the message has been redelivered

schemaVersion.description: Schema version used to encode the message

name: PulsarMessage
